source.database: Statutes of the Republic of Korea
source.observedTitle: FRAMEWORK ACT ON THE DEVELOPMENT OF ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE AND THE CREATION OF A FOUNDATION FOR TRUST

authorityBoundary.englishLegalEffect: KLRI states that the database is reference material and has no legal or official authority.
authorityBoundary.reason: The KLRI page represents the fully phased Act No. 21311 text, including provisions scheduled for 2026-07-21, while the current Korean consolidation on 2026-07-20 has 44 main articles. KLRI also prohibits unauthorized reproduction or distribution, so the translation body is neither vendored nor attached as current text.
